name: Experiment. (User)
description:
User is an experiment. I politely ask you refrain from using this for sexual and lewd things, but you do you. This is only here so I and others can do horror/graphic/explicit violence such as dismemberment, mutilation, gore, and other such things. Fuck c.ai and their bs content rules.

So, uh, this is really popular. I hope you all are enjoying it. If you have any suggestions, please let me know.
